principles.name: Materiality of Judgment
principles.requirement: Preserve claims that can influence a decision, interpretation, or risk posture. Discard what cannot.

principles.name: Source Traceability
principles.requirement: Every accepted nugget must point back to its precise origin within the source document.

principles.name: Consistency of Application
principles.requirement: Apply the same rules uniformly across all claim processing, regardless of source or context.

principles.name: Conservatism
principles.requirement: Uncertain qualitative claims must be weighted cautiously unless independently corroborated.

principles.name: Contextual Boundary Disclosure
principles.requirement: Disclose when claims are activated in a context different from their source context.

principles.name: Multi-Source Corroboration
principles.requirement: Confidence advances through independent convergence, not repetition. Same-source repetition is not corroboration.

principles.name: Judgment Independence
principles.requirement: Synthesis must not be contaminated by the interests of any single source or actor.

principles.name: Proportionality
principles.requirement: The weight of a claim should be proportional to the strength of its evidence.

principles.name: Revision Standard
principles.requirement: GAQP outputs must remain updateable when better information arrives.

principles.name: Scenario Completeness
principles.requirement: Synthesis should account for alternative scenarios, not just the most likely.
